assessments.label: Overall score
assessments.description: The overall score measures the total progress towards achieving all 17 SDGs. The score can be interpreted as a percentage of SDG achievement. A score of 100 indicates that all SDGs have been achieved.

assessments.label: No poverty
assessments.description: End poverty in all its forms everywhere.

assessments.label: Zero hunger
assessments.description: End hunger, achieve food security and improved nutrition and promote sustainable agriculture.

assessments.label: Good health and well-being
assessments.description: Ensure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages.

assessments.label: Quality education
assessments.description: Ensure inclusive and equitable quality education and promote lifelong learning opportunities for all.

assessments.label: Gender equality
assessments.description: Achieve gender equality and empower all women and girls.

assessments.label: Clean water and sanitation
assessments.description: Ensure availability and sustainable management of water and sanitation for all.

assessments.label: Affordable and clean energy
assessments.description: Ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all.

assessments.label: Decent work and economic growth
assessments.description: Promote sustained, inclusive and sustainable economic growth, full and productive employment and decent work for all.

assessments.label: Industry, innovation and infrastructure
assessments.description: Build resilient infrastructure, promote inclusive and sustainable industrialization and foster innovation.

assessments.label: Reduced inequalities
assessments.description: Reduce inequality within and among countries.

assessments.label: Sustainable cities and communities
assessments.description: Make cities and human settlements inclusive, safe, resilient and sustainable.

assessments.label: Responsible consumption and production
assessments.description: Ensure sustainable consumption and production patterns.

assessments.label: Climate action
assessments.description: Take urgent action to combat climate change and its impacts.

assessments.label: Life below water
assessments.description: Conserve and sustainably use the oceans, seas and marine resources for sustainable development.

assessments.label: Life on land
assessments.description: Protect, restore and promote sustainable use of terrestrial ecosystems, sustainably manage forests, combat desertification, and halt and reverse land degradation and halt biodiversity loss .

assessments.label: Peace, justice and strong institutions
assessments.description: Promote peaceful and inclusive societies for sustainable development, provide access to justice for all and build effective, accountable and inclusive institutions at all levels.

assessments.label: Partnerships for the goals
assessments.description: Strengthen the means of implementation and revitalize the Global Partnership for Sustainable Development.

assessments.label: Ratio de la population pauvre disposant de moins de $ 1,90 par jour
assessments.description: Estimated percentage of the population that is living under the poverty threshold of US$1.90 a day. Estimated using historical estimates of the income distribution, projections of population changes by age and educational attainment, and GDP projections.

assessments.label: Ratio de la population pauvre disposant de moins de $ 3,20 par jour
assessments.description: Estimated percentage of the population that is living under the poverty threshold of US$3.20 a day. Estimated using historical estimates of the income distribution, projections of population changes by age and educational attainment, and GDP projections.

assessments.label: Proportion de la population vivant sous le seuil de pauvreté national
assessments.description: The percentage of the total population living below the national poverty line

assessments.label: Prévalence de la sous-alimentation
assessments.description: The percentage of the population whose food intake is insufficient to meet dietary energy requirements for a minimum of one year. Dietary energy requirements are defined as the amount of dietary energy required by an individual to maintain body functions, health and normal activity. FAO et al. (2015) report 14.7 million undernourished people in developed regions, which corresponds to an average prevalence of 1.17% in the developed regions. We assumed a 1.2% prevalence rate for each high-income country with missing data.

assessments.label: Prévalence du retard de croissance (taille/ âge) chez les enfants de moins de 5 ans
assessments.description: The percentage of children up to the age of 5 years that are stunted, measured as the percentage that fall below minus two standard deviations from the median height for their age, according to the WHO Child Growth Standards. UNICEF et al. (2016) report an average prevalence of wasting in high-income countries of 2.58%. We assumed this value for high-income countries with missing data.

assessments.label: Prévalence de l'émaciation chez les enfants de moins de 5 ans
assessments.description: The percentage of children up to the age of 5 years whose weight falls below minus two standard deviations from the median weight for their age, according to the WHO Child Growth Standards. UNICEF et al. (2016) report an average prevalence of wasting in high-income countries of 0.75%. We assumed this value for high-income countries with missing data.

assessments.label: Prévalence de l'obésité, IMC ≥ 30
assessments.description: The percentage of the adult population that has a body mass index (BMI) of 30kg/m² or higher, based on measured height and weight.

assessments.label: Rendement céréalier
assessments.unit: tonnes par hectare de terre récoltée
assessments.description: Cereal yield, measured as tonnes per hectare of harvested land. Production data on cereals relate to crops harvested for dry grain only and excludes crops harvested for hay or green for food, feed, or silage and those used for grazing.

assessments.label: Consommation d'engrais
assessments.unit: kg par hectare de terre arable
assessments.description: The quantity of plant nutrients used per unit of arable land

assessments.label: Taux de mortalité maternelle
assessments.description: The estimated number of women, between the age of 15-49, who die from pregnancy-related causes while pregnant or within 42 days of termination of pregnancy, per 100,000 live births.

assessments.label: Taux de mortalité néonatale
assessments.description: The number of newborn infants (neonates) who die before reaching 28 days of age, per 1,000 live births.

assessments.label: Taux de mortalité, moins de 5 ans
assessments.description: The probability that a newborn baby will die before reaching age five, if subject to age-specific mortality rates of the specified year, per 1,000 live births.

assessments.label: Incidence de la tuberculose
assessments.description: The estimated rate of new and relapse cases of tuberculosis in a given year, expressed per 100,000 people. All forms of tuberculosis are included, including cases of people living with HIV.

assessments.label: Nouvelles infections au VIH
assessments.description: Number of people newly infected with HIV per 1,000 uninfected population.

assessments.label: Personnes vivant avec le VIH recevant une thérapie antirétrovirale
assessments.description: The percentage of people on antiretroviral therapy among all people living with HIV

assessments.label: Proportion d'enfants de moins de 5 ans ayant de la fièvre, qui sont traités avec des médicaments antipaludiques appropriés
assessments.description: The percentage of children aged 0–59 months who were ill with a fever in the two weeks before the survey and who received any anti-malarial drugs during that time.

assessments.label: Taux de mortalité du paludisme
assessments.description: Number of adults and children who have died due to malaria in a specific year, expressed as a rate per 100 000 population.

assessments.label: Couverture de la chimiothérapie préventive pour les maladies tropicales négligées
assessments.description: Coverage is calculated as the number of people in need of PC and treated out of population requiring PC.

assessments.label: Taux de mortalité normalisé par âge dû à une maladie cardiovasculaire, un cancer, un diabète ou une maladie respiratoire chronique chez les adultes âgés de 30 à 70 ans
assessments.description: The probability of dying between the ages of 30 and 70 years from cardiovascular diseases, cancer, diabetes or chronic respiratory diseases, defined as the percent of 30-year-old-people who would die before their 70th birthday from these diseases, assuming current mortality rates at every age and that individuals would not die from any other cause of death (e.g. injuries or HIV/AIDS).

assessments.label: Taux de mortalité (standardisé par l'âge) attribuable à la pollution atmosphérique domestique et à la pollution atmosphérique ambiante
assessments.description: Mortality rate that is attributable to the joint effects of fuels used for cooking indoors and ambient outdoor air pollution.

assessments.label: Taux de mortalité routière
assessments.description: Estimated number of fatal road traffic injuries per 100,000 people.

assessments.label: Espérance de vie à la naissance
assessments.description: The average number of years that a newborn could expect to live, if he or she were to pass through life exposed to the sex- and age-specific death rates prevailing at the time of his or her birth, for a specific year, in a given country, territory, or geographic area.

assessments.label: Taux de fécondité des adolescents
assessments.unit: naissances pour 1 000 femmes âgées de 15 à 19 ans
assessments.description: The number of births per 1,000 women between the age of 15 to 19.

assessments.label: Naissances assistées par du personnel de santé qualifié
assessments.description: The percentage of births attended by personnel trained to give the necessary supervision, care, and advice to women during pregnancy, labor, and the postpartum period, to conduct deliveries on their own, and to care for newborns.

assessments.label: Nourrissons survivants ayant reçu 2 vaccins recommandés par l'OMS
assessments.description: Estimated national routine immunization coverage of infants, expressed as the percentage of surviving infants, children under the age of 12 months, who received two WHO-recommended vaccines (3rd dose of DTP and 1st dose of measles). Calculated as the minimum value between the percentage of infants who have received the 3rd dose of DTP and the percentage who have received the 1st dose of measles.

assessments.label: Indice de couverture universelle de la santé (CHU) de la couverture des services
assessments.description: Coverage of essential health services (defined as the average coverage of essential services based on tracer interventions that include reproductive, maternal, newborn and child health, infectious diseases, non-communicable diseases and service capacity and access, among the general and the most disadvantaged population). The indicator is an index reported on a unitless scale of 0 to 100, which is computed as the geometric mean of 14 tracer indicators of health service coverage.

assessments.label: Taux net de scolarisation dans le primaire
assessments.description: The percentage of children of the official school age population who are enrolled in primary education.

assessments.label: Taux d’achèvement du premier cycle du secondaire
assessments.description: Lower secondary education completion rate measured as the gross intake ratio to the last grade of lower secondary education (general and pre-vocational). It is calculated as the number of new entrants in the last grade of lower secondary education, regardless of age, divided by the population at the entrance age for the last grade of lower secondary education.

assessments.label: Nombre moyen d'années de scolarité
assessments.description: The average number of completed years of education of a country’s population, excluding years spent repeating individual grades.

assessments.label: Taux d'alphabétisation
assessments.unit: % de la population âgée de 15 à 24 ans
assessments.description: The percentage of youth, aged 15 to 24, who can both read and write a short simple statement on everyday life with understanding.

assessments.label: Demande de planification familiale satisfaite par des méthodes modernes
assessments.unit: % des femmes âgées de 15 à 49 ans
assessments.description: The percentage of women of reproductive age whose demand for family planning has been met using modern methods of contraception.

assessments.label: Ratio du nombre moyen d'années d'études des femmes par rapport à celui des hommes
assessments.description: The mean years of education received by women aged 25 and older divided by the mean years of education received by men aged 25 and older.

assessments.label: Ratio du taux d'activité des femmes par rapport à celui des hommes
assessments.description: Modeled estimate of the proportion of the female population aged 15 years and older that is economically active, divided by the same proportion for men.

assessments.label: Sièges occupés par des femmes dans les parlements nationaux
assessments.description: The number of seats held by women in single or lower chambers of national parliaments, expressed as a percentage of all occupied seats. Seats refer to the number of parliamentary mandates, or the number of members of parliament.

assessments.label: Femmes à des postes ministériels
assessments.description: The percentage of women in ministerial positions, reflecting appointments up to 1 January 2017.

assessments.label: Population utilisant au moins les services de base d'eau potable
assessments.description: The percentage of the population using at least a basic drinking water service, such as drinking water from an improved source, provided that the collection time is not more than 30 minutes for a round trip, including queuing.

assessments.label: Population utilisant au moins les services d'assainissement de base
assessments.description: The percentage of the population using at least a basic sanitation service, such as an improved sanitation facility that is not shared with other households.

assessments.label: Prélèvement d'eau douce
assessments.unit: % des ressources en eau douce disponibles
assessments.description: The level of water stress: freshwater withdrawal as a proportion of available freshwater resources is the ratio between total freshwater withdrawn by all major sectors and total renewable freshwater resources, after taking into account environmental water requirements. Main sectors, as defined by ISIC standards, include agriculture, forestry and fishing, manufacturing, electricity industry, and services. This indicator is also known as water withdrawal intensity.

assessments.label: Eaux usées anthropiques qui reçoivent un traitement
assessments.description: The percentage of collected, generated, or produced wastewater that is treated, normalized by the population connected to centralized wastewater treatment facilities. Scores were calculated by multiplying the wastewater treatment summary values, based on decadal averages, with the sewerage connection values to arrive at an overall total percentage of wastewater treated.

assessments.label: Eau rare incorporée dans les importations
assessments.description: Water scarcity is measured as water consumption weighted by scarcity indices. In order to incorporate water scarcity into the virtual water flow calculus, water use entries are weighted so that they reflect the scarcity of the water being used.  The weight used is a measure of water withdrawals as a percentage of the existing local renewable freshwater resources.

assessments.label: Population ayant accès à l'électricité
assessments.description: The percentage of the population who has access to electricity.

assessments.label: Population ayant accès à des combustibles et des technologies propres pour cuisiner
assessments.description: The percentage of the population primarily using clean cooking fuels and technologies for cooking. Under WHO guidelines, kerosene is excluded from clean cooking fuels.

assessments.label: Émissions de CO₂ provenant de la combustion de combustibles pour l’électricité et le chauffage par production totale d’électricité
assessments.description: A measure of the carbon intensity of energy production, calculated by dividing CO₂ emissions from the combustion of fuel by electricity output. The data are reported in Megatonnes per billion kilowatt hours.

assessments.label: Part des énergies renouvelables dans l'approvisionnement total en énergie primaire
assessments.description: The share of renewable energy in the total primary energy supply. Renewables include the primary energy equivalent of hydro (excluding pumped storage), geothermal, solar, wind, tide and wave sources. Energy derived from solid biofuels, biogasoline, biodiesels, other liquid biofuels, biogases and the renewable fraction of municipal waste are also included.

assessments.label: Abordabilité de l'électricité pour les consommateurs
assessments.description: In RISE, electricity is considered affordable if annual expenditure on 30 kWh per month is at most 5 percent of GNI per household of the bottom 20 percent of the population.

assessments.label: Croissance moyenne sur 5 ans, du PIB par habitant
assessments.description: 5-year average annual percentage growth rate of GDP per capita based on constant local currency. Aggregates are based on constant 2010 U.S. dollars. GDP per capita is gross domestic product divided by midyear population. GDP at purchaser's prices is the sum of gross value added by all resident producers in the economy plus any product taxes and minus any subsidies not included in the value of the products. It is calculated without making deductions for depreciation of fabricated assets or for depletion and degradation of natural resources.

assessments.label: Ratio emploi-population
assessments.description: The employment-to-population ratio is the proportion of a country’s working- age population that is employed. Employment comprises all persons of working age who during a specified brief period, such as one week or one day, were in the following categories: a) paid employment (whether at work or with a job but not at work); or b) self-employment (whether at work or with an enterprise but not at work).

assessments.label: Victimes d'esclavage moderne
assessments.description: Estimation of the number of people in modern slavery. Modern slavery is defined as people in forced labor or forced marriage. It is calculated based on standardized surveys and Multiple Systems Estimation (MSE).

assessments.label: Adultes ayant un compte dans une banque ou une autre institution financière ou auprès d'un prestataire de services de téléphonie mobile
assessments.unit: % de la population âgée de 15 ans ou plus
assessments.description: The percentage of adults, 15 years and older, who report having an account (by themselves or with someone else) at a bank or another type of financial institution, or who have personally used a mobile money service within the past 12 months.

assessments.label: Les droits fondamentaux du travail sont effectivement garantis
assessments.description: Measures the effective enforcement of fundamental labor rights, including freedom of association and the right to collective bargaining, the absence of discrimination with respect to employment, and freedom from forced labor and child labor.

assessments.label: Population utilisant l'internet
assessments.description: The percentage of the population who used the Internet from any location in the last three months. Access could be via a fixed or mobile network.

assessments.label: Abonnements au haut débit mobile
assessments.description: The number of mobile broadband subscriptions per 100 population. Mobile broadband subscriptions refer to subscriptions to mobile cellular networks with access to data communications (e.g. the Internet) at broadband speeds, irrespective of the device used to access the internet.

assessments.label: Indice de performance logistique : Qualité des infrastructures liées au commerce et au transport
assessments.description: Survey-based average assessment of the quality of trade and transport related infrastructure, e.g. ports, roads, railroads and information technology, on a scale from 1 (worst) to 5 (best).

assessments.label: Articles de revues scientifiques et techniques
assessments.description: Number of citable documents published by a journal in the three previous years (selected year documents are excluded). Exclusively articles, reviews and conference papers are considered.

assessments.label: Coefficient de Gini
assessments.description: The Gini coefficient measures the extent to which the distribution of income among individuals or households within an economy deviates from a perfectly equal distribution.

assessments.label: Ratio de Palma
assessments.description: The share of all income received by the 10% people with highest disposable income divided by the share of all income received by the 40% people with the lowest disposable income.

assessments.label: Proportion de la population urbaine vivant dans des bidonvilles
assessments.description: Population living in slums is the proportion of the urban population living in slum households. A slum household is defined as a group of individuals living under the same roof lacking one or more of the following conditions: access to improved water, access to improved sanitation, sufficient living area, housing durability, and security of tenur

assessments.label: Concentration moyenne annuelle de particules d'un diamètre inférieur à 2,5 microns (PM2,5)
assessments.description: Air pollution measured as the population-weighted mean annual concentration of PM2.5 for the urban population in a country. PM2.5 is suspended particles measuring less than 2.5 microns in aerodynamic diameter, which are capable of penetrating deep into the respiratory tract and can cause severe health damage.

assessments.label: Accès à une source d'eau améliorée, canalisée
assessments.description: The percentage of the urban population with access to improved drinking water piped on premises. An "improved" drinking-water source is one that, by the nature of its construction and when properly used, adequately protects the source from outside contamination, particularly fecal matter.

assessments.label: Déchets électroniques générés
assessments.description: Waste from electrical and electronic equipment, estimated based on figures for domestic production, imports and exports of electronic products, as well as product lifespan data.

assessments.label: Émissions de SO2 basées sur la production
assessments.description: SO₂ emissions associated with the production of goods and services, which are then either exported or consumed domestically.

assessments.label: Émissions de SO2 importées
assessments.description: Emissions of SO₂ embodied in imported goods and services. SO₂ emissions have severe health impacts and are a significant cause of premature mortality worldwide.

assessments.label: Émissions d’azote dues à la production
assessments.description: Reactive nitrogen emitted during the production of commodities, which are then either exported or consumed domestically. Reactive nitrogen corresponds to emissions of ammonia, nitrogen oxides and nitrous oxide to the atmosphere, and of reactive nitrogen potentially exportable to water bodies, all of which can be harmful to human health and the environment.

assessments.label: Émissions d’azote incorporées dans les importations
assessments.description: Emissions of reactive nitrogen embodied in imported goods and services. Reactive nitrogen corresponds here to emissions of ammonia, nitrogen oxides and nitrous oxide to the atmosphere, and of reactive nitrogen potentially exportable to water bodies, all of which can be harmful to human health and the environment.

assessments.label: Exportations de déchets plastiques
assessments.description: The average annual amount of plastic waste exported over the last 5 years expressed per capita.

assessments.label: Émissions de CO₂ provenant de la combustion de combustibles fossiles et de la production de ciment
assessments.description: Emissions from the combustion and oxidation of fossil fuels and from cement production. The indicator excludes emissions from fuels used for international aviation and maritime transport.

assessments.label: Émissions de CO2 importées, ajustées en fonction de la technologie
assessments.description: CO₂ emissions embodied in imported goods and services.

assessments.label: Émissions de CO2 incorporées dans les exportations de combustibles fossiles
assessments.description: CO₂ emissions embodied in the exports of coal, gas, and oil. Calculated using a 5-year average of fossil fuel exports and converting exports into their equivalent CO₂ emissions. Exports for each fossil fuel are capped at the country's level of production.

assessments.label: Superficie moyenne protégée dans les sites marins importants pour la biodiversité
assessments.description: The mean percentage area of marine Key Biodiversity Areas (sites that are important for the global persistence of marine biodiversity) that are protected.

assessments.label: Indice de santé des océans : Score des eaux propres
assessments.description: The clean waters subgoal of the Ocean Health Index measures to what degree marine waters under national jurisdictions have been contaminated by chemicals, excessive nutrients (eutrophication), human pathogens, and trash.

assessments.label: Poissons capturés par chalutage
assessments.description: The percentage of fish caught by trawling, a method of fishing in which industrial fishing vessels drag large nets (trawls) along the seabed.

assessments.label: Poissons pêchés qui sont ensuite rejetés
assessments.description: The percentage of fish that are caught only to be later discarded.

assessments.label: Menaces sur la biodiversité marine représentées par les importations
assessments.description: Threats to marine species embodied in imports of goods and services.

assessments.label: Superficie moyenne protégée dans les sites terrestres importants pour la biodiversité
assessments.description: The mean percentage area of terrestrial Key Biodiversity Areas (sites that are important for the global persistence of biodiversity) that are protected.

assessments.label: Superficie moyenne protégée dans les sites d’eau douce importants pour la biodiversité
assessments.description: The mean percentage area of freshwater Key Biodiversity Areas (sites that are important for the global persistence of biodiversity) that are protected.

assessments.label: Indice de survie des espèces de la liste rouge
assessments.description: The change in aggregate extinction risk across groups of species. The index is based on genuine changes in the number of species in each category of extinction risk on The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species.

assessments.label: Déforestation permanente
assessments.description: The mean annual percentage of permanent deforestation over the last 3-year period. Permanent deforestation refers to tree cover removal for urbanization, commodity production and certain types of small-scale agriculture whereby the previous tree cover does not return. It does not include temporary forest loss due to cuttings within the forestry sector or wildfires. Since data on tree cover gains are not available, the annual net loss cannot be calculated, thus the indicator is an estimate for gross permanent deforestation.

assessments.label: Menaces sur la biodiversité terrestre et d'eau douce représentées par les importations
assessments.description: Threats to terrestrial and freshwater species embodied in imports of goods and services.

assessments.label: Absence de conflit armé
assessments.description: This indicator measures the number of violent events in both state-based and non-state based conflicts as well as instances of non-state-based conflict within a country's territory.

assessments.label: Détenus non condamnés
assessments.description: Unsentenced prisoners as a percentage of overall prison population. Persons held unsentenced or pre-trial refers to persons held in prisons, penal institutions or correctional institutions who are untried, pre-trial or awaiting a first instance decision on their case from a competent authority regarding their conviction or acquittal.

assessments.label: Droits de propriété
assessments.description: Survey-based assessment of protection of property rights, on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best). The indicator reports respondents' qualitative assessment based on answers to several questions on the protection of property rights and intellectual property rights protection.

assessments.label: Enregistrement des naissances auprès de l'autorité civile
assessments.unit: % des enfants de moins de 5 ans
assessments.description: The percentage of children under the age of five whose births are reported as being registered with the relevant national civil authorities.

assessments.label: Indice de perception de la corruption
assessments.description: The perceived levels of public sector corruption, on a scale from 0 (highest level of perceived corruption) to 100 (lowest level of perceived corruption). The CPI aggregates data from a number of different sources that provide perceptions of business people and country experts.

assessments.label: Responsabilité & Transparence
assessments.description: Assesses institutional and civic check and balances, absence of undue influence on government, disclosure of financial and judicial information, as well as the accessibility of this information.

assessments.label: Enfants impliqués dans le travail des enfants
assessments.unit: % de la population âgée de 5 à 14 ans
assessments.description: The percentage of children, between the age of 5-14 years old, involved in child labor at the time of the survey. A child is considered to be involved in child labor under the following conditions: (a) children 5-11 years old who, during the reference week, did at least one hour of economic activity or at least 28 hours of household chores, or (b) children 12-14 years old who, during the reference week, did at least 14 hours of economic activity or at least 28 hours of household chores. We assumed 0% child labor for high-income countries for which no data was reported.

assessments.label: Indice de liberté de la presse
assessments.description: Degree of freedom available to journalists in 180 countries and regions, determined by pooling the responses of experts to a questionnaire devised by RSF.

assessments.label: Accès à la justice et abordabilité
assessments.description: Measures the accessibility and affordability of civil courts, including whether people are aware of available remedies; can access and afford legal advice and representation; and can access the court system without incurring unreasonable fees, encountering unreasonable procedural hurdles, or experiencing physical or linguistic barriers.

assessments.label: Recettes fiscales
assessments.description: Tax revenues are compulsory transfers to the central government for public purposes. Certain compulsory transfers, such as fines, penalties, and most social security contributions, are excluded. Refunds and corrections of erroneously collected tax revenues are treated as negative revenue. It is reported as a percentage of GDP.

assessments.label: Dépenses publiques de Santé et d'Education
assessments.description: The sum of public expenditure on health from domestic sources and general government expenditure on education (current, capital, and transfers) expressed as a percentage of GDP. This indicator is based on the World Bank health and education spending datasets, sourced from WHO & UNESCO respectively. Values are carried forward for both health and education, but a value in a given year is only reported if at least one data point is a real observation (not carried forward).

assessments.label: Score des paradis fiscaux des entreprises
assessments.description: The Corporate Tax Haven Score measures a jurisdiction’s potential to poach the tax base of others, as enshrined in its laws, regulations and documented administrative practices. For countries with multiple jurisdictions, the value of the worst-performing jurisdiction was retained.

assessments.label: Indice de performance statistique
assessments.description: The Statistical Performance Index is a weighted average of the statistical performance indicators that evaluate the performance of national statistical systems. It aggregates five pillars of statistical performance: data use, data services, data products, data sources, and data infrastructure.
